*Summary:* 7 issues found · 0 critical · 1 moderate · 2 trivial · 3 noise
1 auto-resolved (validated as fixed in codebase) · 3 noise excluded · Incident mode: No

*Auto-Resolved (1):*
- :white_check_mark: *<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3H|FORMORIA-3H: Error: formAddressErrors defined multiple times>* — Only 1 `const formAddressErrors` declaration found at line 158; the duplicate no longer exists in `locations-section.tsx`

*:orange_circle: Moderate — New*
*<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-41|TypeError: controller[kState].transformAlgorithm is not a function>*
Events: 1 · New · Severity: Moderate
Investigate Node.js/TransformStream compatibility — check Node version against `engines` field and any streaming middleware used in the brand detail page route.

*:yellow_circle: Trivial — Recurring*
*<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-37|SyntaxError: Unexpected end of JSON input (FORMORIA-37)>*
Events: 1 · Recurring · Severity: Trivial
Clear `.next/` cache on branch `dev-944-e2e-guides` and rebuild — manifest JSON is likely truncated from an interrupted build.

*:yellow_circle: Trivial — New*
*<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-20|SyntaxError: Unexpected end of JSON input (FORMORIA-20)>*
Events: 1 · New · Severity: Trivial
Same error class as FORMORIA-37 — likely a corrupt `.next` build artifact or truncated JSON API response; clear build cache first.
